headline: Extendicare Announces $450 Million Inaugural Offering of Investment Grade Senior Unsecured Notes
summary: Not for distribution to U.S. news wire services or dissemination in the United States. MARKHAM, Ontario, April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Extendicare Inc. (“Extendicare” or the “Company”) (TSX: EXE) announced today that it has priced an offering (the “Offering”) of $450 million aggregate principal amount of 4.345% senior unsecured notes due April 14, 2031 (the “Notes”). The net proceeds from the Offering are expected to be used to repay in full the indebtedness owing under Extendicare’s term c
